## 📋 Detailed Findings

### 1. 🟠 Unchecked raw_call in withdraw()

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Severity** | HIGH |
| **Confidence** | MEDIUM |
| **Category** | external_call |
| **Detector** | `unsafe_raw_call` |
| **Location** | Line 12 |

raw_call return value is not checked.

<details><summary>📝 Source Code</summary>

```vyper
raw_call(msg.sender, b"", value=amount)
```

</details>

> 💡 **Suggested Fix:** Wrap raw_call in assert.

### 2. 🔵 Timestamp dependence in settle()

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Severity** | LOW |
| **Confidence** | MEDIUM |
| **Category** | timestamp_dependence |
| **Detector** | `timestamp_dependence` |
| **Location** | Line 30 |

block.timestamp used in condition.

<details><summary>📝 Source Code</summary>


</details>

> 💡 **Suggested Fix:** Use oracle/time-window checks.
